attr.title: GridWars
attr.desc: A twin-stick shooter set in a frantic neon ecosystem. Black holes are your apex predators and cash cows. Feed them enemies while keeping them from bursting for as long as possible, before harvesting them for a huge payout.
attr.inst:
Briefly, left trigger/start = menu/ESC, right trigger = bomb/menu select.
Can use either joysticks or D-pad + ABXY; switch and remap buttons in menus.
min spec (rk3326/320x480) works, sort of--menu is partially cut off and it runs a little slow.
